concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains 38 pages. The output JSON explicitly states that 28 sections were omitted. A comparison reveals that major portions of the document, including the 10-page 'RQI T-CPR Program Instructional Overview' (Pages 7-17), the 'Saving Lives Together' marketing brochure (Pages 18-33), and sections on D-RAK introduction (Page 34) and payment options (Page 36), are missing entirely from the converted result. This represents approximately 73% of the source content.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source document contains content on pages 7-27, 29-34, and 36, totaling approximately 28 pages of technical, marketing, and instructional material.
concerns.output_quote: The output JSON explicitly includes a placeholder: '_omitted': '28 sections omitted for token budget'. These sections are absent from the structured content.
concerns.location: Throughout the document, specifically the gap between reading_order 36 and 355.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: Within the sections that were successfully converted, there are two notable text omissions. First, in Item 8 of the minutes (Page 4), the text is truncated mid-sentence ('...at the current co'), losing the words 'urse list for the'. Second, in the contact information section for Dan Jewiss (Page 35), the email address 'D.Jewiss@me.com' is entirely missing, leaving a non-grammatical sentence fragment ('Please contact Dan Jewiss at or 203-704-0581'). concerns.analysis: Two significant table structural errors were found. 1. In the Agenda table (page 1, element 7), the bulleted sub-items for agenda item 8 are removed from their associated table cell and placed into a separate list (element 8) after the entire table concludes. 2. In the Minutes vote table (page 6, element 35), the second row containing column headers is mislabeled as a data row, and the table title row is not configured with the correct column span.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Table on page 1, Tab 8 topic includes bullet points: '• Buncombe County: RQI Telecommunicator CPR Program...'; Vote table on page 6 has headers 'Committee Member', 'Vote to Approve', 'Vote to Not Approve'.
concerns.output_quote: Element 7 table excludes item 8 bullets; Element 35 table mislabels row 2 cell_type as 'data'.
concerns.location: Agenda table (page 1, element 7); Vote table (page 6, element 35).

concerns.analysis: The reading order is materially disrupted in two places. 1. On page 1, agenda item 8's sub-bullets are moved to the end of the agenda (after item 13), separating them from their parent topic. 2. On page 4 and 5, minutes item 8 is split between a heading element (26) and a paragraph element (28), and the split resulted in the truncation/loss of text ('urse list for the').
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Agenda item 8 sub-bullets appear before item 9; Minutes item 8 text reads: '...at the current course list for the subscription at 90%.'
concerns.output_quote: Element 8 (bullets) follows Element 7 (entire table 1-13); Element 26 ends with '...current co' and Element 28 begins with 'subscription at 90%.'

concerns.analysis: The output fails to include critical contact information present in the source. In the RAK Academy section, both the email address 'D.Jewiss@me.com' and the website URL 'www.TheRAKAcademy.com' are missing from the text.
